name: 850 Credit Repair
description_short: 850Above provides professional credit repair services that dispute inaccurate items on credit reports across all three major bureaus, plus credit building and monitoring tools.
description_long:
850Above operates as a credit repair company serving consumers across the USA. The company positions itself as a full-service credit management platform rather than a single-service provider. According to their website, they work directly with all three major credit bureaus to dispute inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items on consumer credit reports.

850Above offers three core services: credit repair (disputing errors and negative marks), credit building (strategies for improving scores through lower utilization and positive payment history), and credit monitoring for ongoing protection. They provide a free credit audit that includes a professional review and personalized recommendations from a credit expert, as well as a downloadable DIY Credit Repair Kit for consumers who prefer self-directed approaches. The company claims clients see average score increases of 100 points within the first 6 months of service.

The company distinguishes itself through transparency about results, citing specific statistics (230M consumer credit files have errors according to CFPB data, 4.5 average derogatory items per consumer). They offer free consultation calls with credit experts and emphasize a guided approach to the dispute and rebuilding process. Their website provides substantial educational content through FAQs covering common credit questions.

A key consideration is that while 850Above claims average 100-point improvements in 6 months, individual results vary significantly based on credit history complexity. The website acknowledges timelines "vary depending on the complexity of your credit history," suggesting outcomes are not guaranteed. No specific pricing, success rates, BBB ratings, or complaint data are disclosed on the public website, which limits independent verification of performance claims.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free credit audit with personalized recommendations from a credit expert
Provides free DIY Credit Repair Kit for self-directed consumers
Works with all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Includes credit building guidance beyond just dispute services
Free consultation calls available to assess credit situation
Offers credit monitoring as part of comprehensive service suite
Claims average 100-point score increase within first 6 months
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website, requiring consultation to learn costs
No BBB rating, complaint data, or third-party reviews visible on the site
Acknowledges variable timelines and results depending on complexity, limiting guarantees
No specific success rate or percentage of disputes won disclosed
Free tools and audits may convert to paid services without clear cost transparency upfront
best_for: Consumers with errors or inaccurate negative marks on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
People wanting to rebuild credit after corrections through guided payment and utilization strategies
Those preferring a comprehensive approach combining repair, building, and monitoring services
diagnosis: 850Above is best for consumers with verifiable errors on their credit reports or negative marks they want to dispute professionally, combined with those seeking rebuilding guidance. The main caveat is that no public pricing, BBB data, or independent outcome verification is available on the website, so consumers should request detailed information about costs and success rates before committing to paid services.
services: Credit repair (disputing inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items)
Dispute filing with all three major credit bureaus
Inquiry removal service (addressing unauthorized hard inquiries)
Free credit audit with personalized recommendations
Free DIY Credit Repair Kit download
Free consultation calls with credit experts
Educational resources and FAQs on credit topics
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 103 S Kenwood St suite a, Glendale, CA 91205
